title: Bump to v1.6
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>
I'll circle back with a follow up for the 1.7-dev after this gets posted.

comments.body: Should we wait for c/storage v1.5 and vendor it here?
Actually yes we should get the user namespace fix.  Although I think there might be a fix required for buildah as well.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Could you move the tag and we can merge this.
Repulled and pushed, now included the containers/storage update from this morning.  Fingers crossed that tests will pass.
